description: Beauty close-up with hands and rings framing the face. Subject's head is subtly turned. Light from camera-right creates a loop nose shadow on the cheek closer to the key. Loop and short are both defensible reads given the subtle pose turn. Single source.

metadata.review_notes: Photographer-verified: single key from camera-right, subtle face turn making loop vs short genuinely ambiguous. Rings/hands are passive reflective elements, not light sources. NOT hybrid.
